pr.title: Depth Recurrence (3+3 x 2 loops) + HW Optimizations

output.summary: Looped 3+3 encoder/decoder blocks with per-loop scale/bias, preserving U-Net skips to reuse half the layers and free bytes for wider modules.
techniques: Depth recurrence sharing 3+3 encoder/decoder layers looped twice
Per-loop learned affine conditioning with 1/√num_loops LR scaling
Hardware optimizations: async prefetch, pinned memory, NCCL tuning, GPU-resident SWA
